children.text: Quick and simple desktop messaging popup
Substitute GSM compatible character for all characters not supported in normal length SMS messages
Display only mobile numbers when searching through contacts for new message
Show the smiley button on the keyboard
Will split messages into compatible lengths. For use if you have trouble sending long messages with your carrier
Adds a counter in front of split messages to keep them in the correct order. Example: (1/3)
Click to unlock the customization pack!
Click to unlock the feature pack!
